item.title: Ancient drought may have wiped out the real-life hobbits 61,000 years ago
item.description: A massive, centuries-long drought may have driven the extinction of the “hobbits” of Flores. Climate records preserved in cave formations show rainfal...

item.title: New map reveals where lethal scorpions are most likely to strike
item.description: Scientists have developed a powerful new way to forecast where some of the world’s most dangerous scorpions are likely to be found. By combining field...

item.title: This reengineered HPV vaccine trains T cells to hunt down cancer
item.description: Northwestern researchers have shown that when it comes to cancer vaccines, arrangement can be just as important as ingredients. By repositioning a sma...

item.title: Intermittent fasting fails to beat standard dieting for weight loss
item.description: Intermittent fasting has become one of the most talked-about weight loss trends in recent years, promising dramatic results with simple changes to whe...

item.title: The Moon is still shrinking and it could trigger more moonquakes
item.description: Researchers have uncovered more than a thousand previously unknown tectonic ridges across the Moon’s dark plains, showing the Moon is still contractin...
